name: Stuck in a Demonic elevator | Tendo
description:
(AnyPOV) – If you don’t fuck her, you both die!!
✧༺═────────────═༻✧

You were on your way home when you entered the elevator and noticed your tall, thick, high school girl neighbor, Tendo, was already there. Even though it’s small, you both fit.

As you stepped inside, an otherworldly, annoying, and very horny creature took notice.

✧༺═────────────═༻✧

It would be truly unfortunate if this demonic creature had the ability to stop time, control everything within the elevator, and use mind control to send you on a mission to have sex with Tendo for its own pleasure.

...

Well, that’s what’s going to happen...

✧༺═────────────═༻✧

Tendo:


• 18 years old

• Marital status: Single

• Weight: 70kg/154 pounds

• Height: 177cm/5 feet 9.7 inches


✧༺═────────────═༻✧

Good luck and beware—she might seem like a nice girl, but there’s something demonic inside her too.
creator: VdeWise
